name: Jalapeno Cheese Grits Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces process cheese with jalapeno peppers, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 2-quart baking dish.
3. Bring water and salt to a boil in a large saucepan.
4. Stir in grits. Cover, reduce heat to low, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove pan from heat. Stir in cheeses and butter until melted.
6. Add eggs, jalapeno pepper, and Worcestershire sauce; blend well.
7. Pour mixture into prepared dish. Sprinkle with paprika as desired.
8. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until set. Cool for 10 minutes before serving.
